description: Contains International Patent Classification (IPC) codes assigned to patent applications, categorizing inventions by technical field.

columns.name: appln_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the patent application.

columns.name: ipc_class_level
columns.description: Hierarchical level of the IPC code (e.g., section, class, subclass, group).

columns.name: ipc_version
columns.description: Date indicating which version of the IPC classification system was used.

columns.name: ipc_position
columns.description: Position or rank of this IPC code relative to other codes assigned to the application.

columns.name: ipc_class_symbol
columns.description: IPC classification code indicating the technical field of the invention.

columns.name: ipc_value
columns.description: Indicator of whether this is the main IPC code (I=inventive) or additional (A=additional).

columns.name: ipc_gener_auth
columns.description: Authority that generated or assigned the IPC classification code.
